description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named SCons that runs on push, pull request, and release events. Use a matrix job that builds on multiple operating systems, including Ubuntu, Windows, and macOS, with varying SCons options and experimental flags. For each job, check out the repository, set up Python 3, install SCons and dependencies, build the package, run unit tests, and archive the distribution. On macOS release events, upload the distribution to the release.
